_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn why it is important to keep trying when things are hard or new, including the value of trying new things.

_source.w: We learn why it is important to keep trying when things are hard or new, including the value of trying new things.
y: Effort and persistence are more important than natural talent for long-term success.
Trying new things is how we discover abilities we did not know we had.
Building a 'keep trying' attitude prepares us for challenges throughout life.
eg: We share a time when we kept going even though something was hard.
We try a new activity and talk about how it felt — scary, exciting, interesting.
We learn the word 'resilience' and what it means.
We celebrate classmates who showed persistence, not just those who succeeded.
We discuss characters in stories who kept trying and what happened.
We practise positive self-talk: 'This is hard, but I can keep going.'.
